# saasutils_gobright_integration (Data Source)

Look up an existing GoBright integration by name + external_system + microsoft_permission_mode. Errors if the filters do not identify exactly one integration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `external_system` (String) Filter: integration type. One of `openid` (GoBright externalSystem=14) or `office365` (=1).
- `name` (String) Filter: GoBright integration `name` (exact match).

### Optional

- `microsoft_permission_mode` (Boolean) Filter: GoBright `microsoftPermissionMode` projected to a boolean (false=0, true=1). Omit (or set `null`) to match integrations where the API returns null — typical for OIDC integrations.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Stringified GoBright integer id.
- `new_id` (String) Server-generated GUID.
- `oidc` (Block, Read-only) OIDC fields from the matched integration. Populated by the data source's Read. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--oidc))

<a id="nestedblock--oidc"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oidc`

Read-Only:

- `audience` (String)
- `issuer` (String)
- `jwks_endpoint` (String)
- `public_key` (String)
- `related_user_integration_id` (Number)
- `token_replay_prevention_mode` (Boolean) GoBright `oidcTokenReplayPreventionMode` projected to a boolean (false=0, true=1).
- `user_identifier_claim_name` (String)
- `validation_mode` (Boolean) GoBright `oidcValidationMode` projected to a boolean (false=0, true=1).
